translations.name: 糯米鸡
translations.description: 经典港式糯米鸡，每份2个，以荷叶包裹糯米、鸡肉和香菇蒸制而成，软糯咸香。含大豆、小麦（麸质）、芝麻；

translations.name: Glutinous Rice Chicken
translations.description: Classic Hong Kong Glutinous Rice Chicken, 2 pieces per portion, with glutinous rice, chicken, and shiitake mushrooms wrapped in lotus leaf and steamed. Contains soy, wheat (gluten), and sesame;

translations.name: 烧麦
translations.description: 经典港式烧麦，外皮轻薄，内馅鲜香多汁，常以猪肉、虾仁及香菇蒸制而成。含小麦（麸质）、大豆、甲壳类；

translations.name: SuiMai
translations.description: Classic Hong Kong siu mai with a delicate wrapper and savory filling of pork, prawn, and shiitake mushroom. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and crustaceans;

translations.name: 叉烧包
translations.description: 经典港式叉烧包，松软包皮包裹香甜咸鲜的叉烧馅，口感蓬松细腻。每份约3个，热量约420–600千卡。含小麦（麸质）、大豆；

translations.name: CharSiuBao
translations.description: Classic Hong Kong char siu bao with a soft fluffy bun and sweet-savory barbecued pork filling. Approx. 3 pieces per portion, 420–600 kcal. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy;

translations.name: 鸭卷
translations.description: 经典港式鸭卷，外皮酥脆，内馅鲜香，炸制后口感丰富。每份约 2–3 件，热量约 280–450 千卡。含小麦（麸质）、大豆；

translations.name: Duck Spring Rolls
translations.description: Classic Hong Kong duck roll with a crispy wrapper and savoury duck filling. Approx. 2–3 pieces per portion, 280–450 kcal. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy;

translations.name: 烧鸭饭
translations.description: 经典港式烧鸭饭，烧鸭皮脆肉嫩，搭配米饭与酱汁，风味浓郁。每份约 650–800 千卡。含小麦（麸质）、大豆、芝麻；

translations.name: Roast Duck Rice
translations.description: Classic Hong Kong roast duck rice with crispy roast duck, steamed rice, and savoury sauce. Approx. 650–800 kcal per serving. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and sesame;

translations.name: 小笼包
translations.description: 经典小笼包，薄皮包裹鲜嫩猪肉与浓郁汤汁，现蒸上桌，鲜香多汁。含小麦（麸质）、大豆；

translations.name: SiuLoongBao
translations.description: Classic Xiao Long Bao with delicate wheat skin, filled with juicy pork and savoury broth, freshly steamed to order. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy

translations.name: 虾饺
translations.description: 经典港式虾饺，晶莹薄皮包裹鲜虾，现蒸上桌，鲜甜弹嫩。含甲壳类、小麦（麸质）、大豆；

translations.name: HarGao
translations.description: Classic Har Gow with a delicate translucent wrapper and juicy shrimp filling, freshly steamed. Contains crustaceans, wheat (gluten), and soy;

translations.name: 腐皮卷
translations.description: 经典港式腐皮卷，以豆腐皮包裹鲜虾与肉馅炸至金黄，外皮酥脆，内馅鲜香多汁。含大豆、小麦（麸质）、甲壳类及蛋。

translations.name: Bean Curd Skin Roll
translations.description: Classic bean curd roll filled with prawn and meat, wrapped in tofu skin and deep-fried until golden and crispy. Contains soy, wheat (gluten), crustaceans, and egg.

translations.name: 叉烧卷
translations.description: 经典港式叉烧卷，松软面皮包裹香甜多汁叉烧馅，蒸制而成，口感柔软香浓。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: CharSiu Spring Rolls
translations.description: Classic Cantonese CharSiu Spring with a soft steamed dough wrapper and a sweet-savory char siu filling. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 猪肉饺子
translations.description: 手工猪肉饺子，内馅鲜嫩多汁，饺子皮劲道饱满，经典中式风味。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Home Made Pork Dumpling
translations.description: Homemade pork dumplings with a juicy seasoned pork filling and tender dumpling skin. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 炸虾 6pcs
translations.description: 香炸大虾，外层金黄酥脆，虾肉鲜嫩弹牙，口感香酥可口。含甲壳类、小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Deep-Fry KingPrawn 6pcs
translations.description: Deep-fried king prawns with a golden crispy coating and juicy, tender prawn inside. Contains crustaceans, wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 炸虾 8pcs
translations.description: 香炸大虾，外层金黄酥脆，虾肉鲜嫩弹牙，口感香酥可口。含甲壳类、小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋

translations.name: Deep-Fry KingPrawn 8pcs
translations.description: Deep-fried king prawns with a golden crispy coating and juicy, tender prawn inside. Contains crustaceans, wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 叉烧饭
translations.description: 经典叉烧饭，香甜多汁的港式叉烧配上米饭，风味浓郁，咸香可口。含小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: Sweet Roast Pork Rice
translations.description: Classic char siu rice with tender Cantonese BBQ pork served over steamed rice, rich in sweet and savoury flavour. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy.

translations.name: 脆皮烧肉饭
translations.description: 经典脆皮烧肉饭，脆皮烧肉外皮酥脆、肉质鲜嫩，配上米饭，咸香浓郁。含小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: Crispy Roast Pork Rice
translations.description: Classic crispy pork belly rice with crispy skin, tender meat, and steamed rice, rich in savoury flavour. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy.

translations.name: 豉油鸡饭
translations.description: 经典豉油鸡饭，鸡肉鲜嫩入味，淋上浓香豉油酱汁，配上米饭，风味咸香可口。含小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: Soya Chicken Rice
translations.description: Classic soy sauce chicken rice with tender chicken, served with steamed rice and rich savoury soy sauce. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy.

translations.name: 双拼饭
translations.description: 经典双拼饭，可选择两款烧味搭配米饭，肉香浓郁，口感丰富，满足不同口味选择。含小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: Double Roast Rice
translations.description: Classic two-combination rice with your choice of two roasted meat selections served over steamed rice, rich in flavour and satisfying in texture. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy.

translations.name: 牛肉饭
translations.description: 经典牛肉饭，牛肉鲜嫩入味，配上米饭，口感丰富，咸香可口。含小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: Beef Rice
translations.description: Classic beef rice with tender, flavourful beef served over steamed rice, rich and savoury in taste. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy.

translations.name: 大虾炒饭
translations.description: 经典大虾炒饭，以鲜嫩大虾搭配米饭大火快炒，粒粒分明，鲜香可口。含甲壳类、蛋、小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: King Prawn Fried Rice
translations.description: Classic king prawn fried rice with juicy prawns and fluffy stir-fried rice, full of savoury flavour. Contains crustaceans, egg, wheat (gluten), and soy.

translations.name: 鸡炒饭
translations.description: 经典鸡炒饭，以鲜嫩鸡肉搭配米饭大火快炒，粒粒分明，香气十足。含蛋、小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: Chicken Fried Rice
translations.description: Classic chicken fried rice with tender chicken and fluffy stir-fried rice, full of savoury wok flavour. Contains egg, wheat (gluten), and soy.

translations.name: 鸭炒饭
translations.description: 经典鸭肉炒饭，以鲜嫩鸭肉搭配米饭大火快炒，粒粒分明，香气浓郁。含蛋、小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: Duck Fried Rice
translations.description: Classic duck fried rice with tender duck and fluffy stir-fried rice, full of rich savoury wok flavour. Contains egg, wheat (gluten), and soy.

translations.name: 咖喱大虾
translations.description: 经典咖喱大虾，鲜嫩大虾配上浓郁香滑咖喱酱，风味浓厚，微辣开胃。含甲壳类、大豆及小麦（麸质）。

translations.name: King Prawn Curry
translations.description: Classic king prawn curry with tender prawns in a rich, smooth curry sauce, full of aromatic flavour with a gentle spicy kick. Contains crustaceans, soy, and wheat (gluten).

translations.name: 咖喱牛肉
translations.description: 经典咖喱牛肉，鲜嫩牛肉配上浓郁香滑咖喱酱，风味醇厚，微辣开胃。含大豆及小麦（麸质）。

translations.name: Beef Curry
translations.description: Classic beef curry with tender beef in a rich, smooth curry sauce, full of aromatic flavour with a gentle spicy kick. Contains soy and wheat (gluten).

translations.name: 咖喱鸡肉
translations.description: 经典咖喱鸡肉，鲜嫩鸡肉配上浓郁香滑咖喱酱，风味丰富，微辣开胃。含大豆及小麦（麸质）。

translations.name: Chicken Curry
translations.description: Classic chicken curry with tender chicken in a rich, smooth curry sauce, full of aromatic flavour with a gentle spicy kick. Contains soy and wheat (gluten).

translations.name: 豉油鸡汤面
translations.description: 经典豉油鸡汤面，鲜嫩鸡肉搭配爽滑面条与清香汤底，味道鲜美，咸香可口。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Soya Chicken Noodle soup
translations.description: Classic soy sauce chicken noodle soup with tender chicken, silky noodles, and a light savoury broth. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 烧鸭汤面
translations.description: 经典烧鸭汤面，鲜嫩烧鸭搭配爽滑面条与清香汤底，味道鲜美，香气浓郁。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Roast Duck Noodle Soup
translations.description: Classic roast duck noodle soup with tender roast duck, silky noodles, and a light savoury broth. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 叉烧汤面
translations.description: 经典叉烧汤面，香甜多汁叉烧搭配爽滑面条与清香汤底，鲜美可口。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Char Siu Noodle soup
translations.description: Classic char siu noodle soup with tender Cantonese BBQ pork, silky noodles, and a light savoury broth. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 牛肉汤面
translations.description: 经典牛肉面，鲜嫩牛肉搭配爽滑面条与浓郁汤底，味道鲜美，香气十足。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Beef Noodle soup
translations.description: Classic beef noodle soup with tender beef, silky noodles, and a rich savoury broth. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 鸡丝汤面
translations.description: 经典鸡丝汤面，鲜嫩鸡丝搭配爽滑面条与清香汤底，口感细腻，鲜美可口。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Shredded Chicken Noodle soup
translations.description: Classic shredded chicken noodle soup with tender chicken strips, silky noodles, and a light savoury broth. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 云吞面
translations.description: 经典云吞面，鲜美云吞搭配爽滑面条与清香汤底，口感丰富，鲜香可口。含甲壳类、小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Won Ton Noodle soup
translations.description: Classic wonton noodle soup with savoury wontons, silky noodles, and a light flavourful broth. Contains crustaceans, wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 脆皮烧肉汤面
translations.description: 经典脆皮烧肉汤面，脆皮烧肉搭配爽滑面条与清香汤底，鲜香浓郁，口感丰富。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Crispy Roast Pork Noodle soup
translations.description: Classic crispy pork belly noodle soup with crispy pork, silky noodles, and a light savoury broth. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 双拼汤面
translations.description: 经典双拼汤面，可选择两款烧味搭配爽滑面条与清香汤底，风味浓郁，口感丰富。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Double Roast Noodle soup
translations.description: Classic two-combination noodle soup with your choice of two roasted meat selections, silky noodles, and a light savoury broth. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 干炒河粉
translations.description: 经典干炒牛河，嫩滑牛肉搭配宽河粉大火快炒，镬气十足，咸香浓郁。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Stir Fry Beef Rice Noodle
translations.description: Classic stir-fried beef ho fun with tender beef and wide rice noodles, wok-fried for a rich savoury flavour. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 炒乌冬面
translations.description: 经典炒乌冬面，烧鸭 鸡肉或大虾搭配劲道乌冬面大火快炒，香气浓郁，口感丰富。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Stir Fried Udon
translations.description:
Classic Wok-Fried Udon Noodles
Roast duck, chicken, or king prawns stir-fried with thick, chewy udon noodles over high heat, delivering a rich aroma and a flavorful, satisfying bite.
Contains: Wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 大虾炒面
translations.description: 经典大虾炒面，鲜嫩大虾搭配爽滑面条大火快炒，香气十足，鲜香可口。含甲壳类、小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: King Prawn Stir Fried Noodle
translations.description: Classic king prawn fried noodles with juicy prawns and stir-fried noodles, full of rich savoury wok flavour. Contains crustaceans, wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 鸡丝炒面
translations.description: 经典鸡丝炒面，鲜嫩鸡丝搭配爽滑面条大火快炒，香气浓郁，鲜香可口。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Chicken Fried Noodles
translations.description: Classic shredded chicken fried noodles with tender chicken strips and stir-fried noodles, full of rich savoury wok flavour. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 鸭肉炒面
translations.description: 经典鸭肉炒面，鲜嫩鸭肉搭配爽滑面条大火快炒，香气浓郁，口感丰富。含小麦（麸质）、大豆及蛋。

translations.name: Duck Fried Noodles
translations.description: Classic duck fried noodles with tender duck and stir-fried noodles, full of rich savoury wok flavour. Contains wheat (gluten), soy, and egg.

translations.name: 半只烧鸭
translations.description: 皮脆肉嫩，鲜香多汁，层次丰富，深受欢迎的人气之选。

translations.name: Half Portion Roast Duck
translations.description: Perfectly crispy skin with juicy, flavorful meat — a customer favorite packed with rich taste.

translations.name: 烧鸭
translations.description: 皮脆肉嫩，鲜香多汁，层次丰富，深受欢迎的人气之选。

translations.name: Full Roast Duck
translations.description: Perfectly crispy skin with juicy, flavorful meat — a customer favorite packed with rich taste.

translations.name: 蜜汁叉烧
translations.description: 精选猪肉配以秘制酱料腌制，慢火烤制而成，香甜多汁，风味浓郁（约400克）

translations.name: Char Siu
translations.description: Premium pork marinated in a house special sauce and slow-roasted to perfection, delivering a rich, juicy, and flavorful bite.(Approx. 400g)

translations.name: 脆皮烧肉
translations.description: 外脆内嫩，入口即化，香而不腻，深受欢迎的人气之选（约400克）

translations.name: Crispy Roast Pork Belly
translations.description: Perfectly crispy on the outside and tender inside, rich yet not greasy — a customer favorite. (Approx. 400g)

translations.name: 全肉双拼
translations.description: 经典纯肉三拼烧腊拼盘，可自选三款烧味组合，肉香浓郁，口感丰富，适合分享。含小麦（麸质）及大豆。

translations.name: Roast Meat Platter
translations.description: A classic three-meat barbecue platter with your choice of three roasted meat selections, rich in flavour and perfect for sharing. Contains wheat (gluten) and soy.

translations.name: 半只豉油鸡
translations.description: 色泽红润，肉质鲜嫩多汁，咸香入味，经典广式风味

translations.name: Half Portion Soya Chicken
translations.description: Tender and juicy chicken braised in soy sauce, rich in savory flavor — a classic Cantonese dish.

translations.name: 豉油鸡
translations.description: 色泽红润，肉质鲜嫩多汁，咸香入味，经典广式风味。

translations.name: Soya Chicken
translations.description: Tender and juicy chicken braised in soy sauce, rich in savory flavor — a classic Cantonese dish.

translations.name: 串鸡
translations.description: 嫩滑鸡肉串配以香浓沙爹酱，带有浓郁花生香味，风味独特

translations.name: Chicken Satay Skewers
translations.description: Grilled chicken skewers served with rich satay sauce, infused with a fragrant peanut flavor.

translations.name: 辣袋
translations.description: 鸡丝配薯条、洋葱，加入秘制香料翻炒，香辣过瘾，是爱尔兰人气外卖。

translations.name: Spice Bag
translations.description: A popular Irish-Chinese takeaway dish with crispy salt & chilli chicken, chips, peppers, and onions, tossed in a flavorful spice mix.

translations.name: 绿茶
translations.description: 清新茶香搭配淡淡甜味，口感清爽解渴

translations.name: Green Tea
translations.description: A refreshing green tea with a light sweetness, smooth and easy to drink.

translations.name: 红茶
translations.description: 茶味浓郁，带有柔和甜味，口感顺滑，是经典的即饮茶选择

translations.name: Iced Black Tea
translations.description: A smooth and flavorful black tea with a gentle sweetness, perfect for everyday refreshment.

translations.name: 加多宝
translations.description: 传统凉茶饮品，由多种草本植物熬制而成，口感清甜，清凉解腻

translations.name: Jia Duo Bao Herbal Tea
translations.description: A traditional Chinese herbal tea made from natural herbs, mildly sweet and refreshing.

translations.name: 杨枝甘露
translations.description: 香甜芒果搭配西柚果肉与西米露，口感清爽顺滑，是一款人气热带风味饮品。

translations.name: Bottled Mango Pomelo Sago
translations.description: A fruity and refreshing tropical drink with a smooth texture — a customer favorite.

translations.name: 汤
translations.description: 精选排骨配以食材长时间炖煮，汤味清甜醇厚，滋补暖胃，回味悠长

translations.name: Daily Soup
translations.description: A light yet flavorful soup with tender pork ribs, comforting and nourishing — perfect for a warm, satisfying meal.

translations.name: 卤鸡蛋
translations.description: 精选鸡蛋慢火卤制，充分吸收酱香，口感细腻，味道浓郁。

translations.name: Marinated Egg
translations.description: Carefully braised eggs infused with a house soy-based sauce, delivering a deep and savory taste.

translations.name: 炸蛋
translations.description: 外酥内嫩，蛋香浓郁，口感丰富，是简单却美味的经典配菜

translations.name: Crispy Fried Egg
translations.description: Crispy on the outside with a soft, tender center, offering a rich egg flavor and satisfying texture.

translations.name: 哈密瓜气泡水
translations.description: 碳酸水、高果糖玉米糖浆、葡萄提取物、酸性（柠檬酸（E330））、调味剂。

translations.name: SANGARIA MELON SODA
translations.description: Carbonated Water, High Fructose Corn Syrup, Grape Extract, Acidulant [Citric Acid (E330)], Flavoring.
